punch_drunk: +20% Урон от выстрелов в голову (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
nightwatcher: +100% Убыстрение импульсного сканер (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
chill_out: Имеет 2 слота для вставок, но одну случайную характеристику (вместо двух)
the_hollow_man: +14% Урон здоровью (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
liquid_engineer: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +12% bonus armor for 10s. Max stack is 10
hermano: You and allies within 15m of your deployed skills, gain +30% reload speed and reduces active cooldowns by 0.6 each second.
the_courier:
When you apply a status effect, it is also applied to all enemies within 10m of your target. 

Cooldown: 10s
backbone:
Killing an enemy increases total weapon damage by 7% for 15s.
Stacks up to 5.
Grenade kills add 2 stacks.
anarchist_s_cookbook: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 27s
strategic_alignment: Applying a status effect to an enemy increases total skill damage and repair by 20% for 27s
lavoisier: Applying Blind, Ensnare, Confuse, or Shock to an enemy grants 50% of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies within 30 meters of that enemy for 10 seconds.
matador:
When you are within 10m of an enemy, gain 23% bonus armor for 5s. Stacks up to 3 times.

Cooldown: 5s
the_gift:
Increases total weapon damage by 25%. 
Taking damage disables buff for 3s
percussive_maintenance: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 27s
vigil:
Amplifies total weapon damage for 10s when swapping between your primary and secondary weapons if they are different.

45% to enemies within 15m for Shotguns and SMG's.
45% to enemies further than 25m for Rifles and MMR's.
20% to enemies between 15-25m for LMG's and AR's
At most once per 5s per weapon type.
devil_s_due:
When you are below 20% armor, critical hits repair 2.5% of missing armour. 
On kill, critical hits repair 2.5% of missing armor for 4 seconds.
Lowest possible repair is 0% armour

Each red core attribute adds 1 second to the time.
Maximum is 10 seconds.
battery_pack: Kills from cover reduce skill cooldowns by 15%.
the_setup: Enemies you hit with shotguns and marksman rifles amplifies the damage they take by 15% from all sources for 5s.
force_multiplier: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage by 30% for 3s.
proxy:
Enemies that walk within 3 meters of your Hive, Turret, Remote Pulse or Decoy are shocked.

Arm time: 2 seconds. Cooldown per Skill: 8 seconds
axel:
Using an armor kit grants +1 Skill Tier for 15s. 
If already at Skill Tier 6, grants Overcharge. 

Cooldown 30s.
cap_n:
Performing a cover to cover grants 20% of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies for 10s. 
This is Tripled if you end within 10m of an enemy. 

Cooldown: 10s.
festive_delivery:
Concussion grenades become Festive Grenades.

Hitting an enemy with a Festive Grenade will cause explosions to happen around two other enemies within 20m. 10m in pvp 

*Dealing 15% damage in PVP
henri: While you are within 10m of an ally or skill, total weapon damage is increased by 20%
hunter_killer:
While you have bonus armour, gain 3 stacks each second up to a max of 10. Each stack increases total weapon damage by 4% to enemies within 10m.

All stacks are lost when you have no bonus armour.
everyday_carrier:
Using an armor kit has a 75% chance to not consume the armor kit. Specialization armor kit bonuses are increased by 100%.

Requires 10 seconds to arm talent
chainkiller:
After killing an enemy with a headshot, your next weapon hit within 30s deals 150% of that killing blow’s damage in addition to it.

Damage is capped to 800% of your weapon damage. This is raised to 1250% if your headshot damage is greater than 150%.
pointman:
Deploying a shield makes it invulnerable for 5s and grants 50% of your armor as bonus armor to all other allies for 20s. 

Cooldown: 25s
vedmedytsya_vest: While in cover weapon handling is increased by +50%
the_sacrifice:
All damage you deal is amplified by 30%. 
All damage you take is amplified by 60%.
zero_f_s: На этом поле растут мои проблемы. Пусть оно остается пустым.
ferocious_calm: After staying in cover for 8 seconds, increase your and all allies’ total weapon and skill damage by 14% as long as you remain in cover or in a cover-to-cover move.
door_kicker_s_knock: Все просто: пускаешь ищейку и ждешь. Главное, не попади под разряд. Шарахнет больно.
caesar_s_guard: Skill kills have a 30% chance to reset skill cooldowns
closer: Amplifies total weapon and skill damage by 20% to pulsed enemies.
cherished: Applies blind to enemy hit in the head. Cooldown 20 seconds. Applies bleed to an enemy hit in the chest. Cooldown 20 seconds
carpenter:
Grenade Radius is increased by 75%
Grenade that kill an enemy are refunded.
Grenades can now be ''cooked'' by holding the fire button, making them explode earlier.
Gain 15% bonus armor while aiming grendes
bober: If you are below 30% Armor, headshots from cover repair 30% of your armor. Cooldown 2 seconds.
pristine_example: Increases total weapon damage by 6% every second you are aiming while scoped 8x or higher, up to 60%.
sleight:
Grants +40% bonus armor while reloading.

Grants 0-30% of your armor as bonus armor to all other allies when they are reloading, based on your Blue core attribute.
combustor:
Whenever you throw a skill, 1.5 seconds after landing, it creates an explosion damaging enemies within 5m. 
Afterwards explosions will occur evey 5s.

Damage scales with skill tier dealing 25-100% damage of a concussion grenade. 

Occurs once per skill. 

Applies to Remote Pulse, All Turrets, All Hives, Explosive Seeker, Cluster Seeker, Mender Seeker, Decoy, All Traps.
equalizer: Critical hits increase total weapon damage by 1% for 10s. Stacks up to 24 times.
deathgrips: +10% Броня за убийство (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
contractor_s_gloves: +8% Урон броне (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
motherly_love: +25% Прочность объектов навыков (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
firm_handshake: +16% Негативные эффекты (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
forge: +50% Прочность щита (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
ammo_dump: +10% Боезапас (Данный параметр НЕ заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
picaros_holster: 10% урона оружия (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику, главный атрибут - защита (броня), однако, с помощью перекалибровки его можно сменить только на навык)
claws_out: +11% Урон от пистолета, +500% Урон в рукопашной; +1 дополнительная случайная (всего три)
fox_s_prayer: +8% Урон цели вне укрытия (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
snow_machine: Талант "Метель": Вместе с любыми негативными эффектами вы так же накладываете на цель снегопад.
turmoil: При нанесении противнику урона от оружия 50% от урона будет нанесено не этому, а другому противнику в радиусе 30м. При отсутствии других противников поблизости урон наностится полностью. На бронепластины эффект не распространяется.
emperor_s_guard: +1% Восстановление брони (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
grease: +16% Негативные эффекты (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
cloak: +50% Уменьшение угрозы (Данный параметр заменяет дополнительную характеристику)
impetus: Остановиться? Не могу, не хочу и не буду.
